paper.title_en: Simulating Majorana fermions in black hole with Ising Models
paper.abstract_en: Quantum field theory (QFT) in curved spacetime has led to profound predictions, including the Unruh effect and Hawking radiation, yet their direct observation remains extraordinarily challenging because of their extremely weak signatures. Here, we show that the transverse-field Ising model provides a quantum simulator for Majorana fermions in a Schwarzschild black hole background. Remarkably, different coordinate representations of the same spacetime-Schwarzschild, tortoise, Kruskal, and conformally flat-map onto distinct microscopic Ising spin models. Despite their microscopic differences, these models converge in the continuum limit to the same Majorana field theory, exhibiting an emergent form of general covariance. This provides a rare example of a fundamental symmetry of general relativity arising as an emergent property of a condensed matter system. We further demonstrate how black hole particle production can be simulated and detected through spin correlation measurements, and discuss experimental platforms capable of realizing these models. Our work establishes a practical route for investigating fermionic QFT in curved spacetime using controllable quantum many-body systems and tabletop experiments.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文展示了利用横向场伊辛模型模拟施瓦西黑洞背景中马约拉纳费米子的方法，并揭示了广义协变性的涌现，对黑洞热力学和量子引力模拟有高度相关性和创新性。
decision.title_zh: 用伊辛模型模拟黑洞中的马约拉纳费米子
decision.abstract_zh: 弯曲时空中的量子场论已带来深刻预测，包括安鲁效应和霍金辐射，然而由于它们极其微弱的特征，直接观测仍然极具挑战性。在这里，我们展示了横向场伊辛模型为施瓦西黑洞背景中的马约拉纳费米子提供了一个量子模拟器。值得注意的是，同一时空的不同坐标表示——施瓦西、龟坐标、克鲁斯卡和共形平坦——映射到不同的微观伊辛自旋模型。尽管这些模型在微观上存在差异，但在连续极限下它们收敛到相同的马约拉纳场论，展现出一种涌现的广义协变性。这提供了一个罕见的例子，即广义相对论的基本对称性作为凝聚态系统的涌现性质出现。我们进一步演示了如何通过自旋关联测量来模拟和探测黑洞的粒子产生，并讨论了能够实现这些模型的实验平台。我们的工作为使用可控量子多体系统和桌面实验研究弯曲时空中的费米子量子场论建立了一条实用途径。
keywords_en: quantum field theory in curved spacetime
